_comment: tunnel-client configuration template for portfolio MCP. Copy to ~/.tunnel-client/profiles/<name>.json or pass flags manually. Replace PLACEHOLDER values with real credentials — never commit real keys.

portfolio-mcp-stdio._description: Stdio mode — tunnel-client spawns `bun run mcp` as a child process.

portfolio-mcp-http._description: HTTP mode — tunnel-client connects to a running portfolio API server at /mcp.

harpoon_config._description: Optional harpoon allowlist for outbound HTTP callouts from MCP server. Only enable and configure if your MCP server needs controlled outbound access.
